kaalsarp_dosha.bot_response: You do not have Kaal-Sarp dosha
remedies: Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. A person having Kaal Sarpa Yoga in his/her kundli should worship Lord Shiva regularly and for better results, one can also chant the Moola Mantra of Lord Shiva. “Om Namah Shivaya”(ॐ नमः शिवाय). This mantra acts as a Kaal Sarpa Dosha Nivaran mantra. The students who are affected by the malefic effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga should chant the Moola Mantra of Goddess Sarasvati. Chanting the Moola mantra will enhance the concentration power of the students and as a result, they will be able to perform better. ‘Om SaraswatiMayaa Drishtwa, VeenaPustak Dharnim| HansVahini Samayuktaa MaaVidya DaanKarotu Me Om’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. In an auspicious Muhurat, offer three pieces of coal in flowing water, one at a time. It is one of the best Kaal Sarpa Dosh remedies. This will nullify the effect of Kaal Sarpa Dosh from the native’s horoscope and he/she would be able to lead a more peaceful and happy life.Chanting Hanuman Chalisa 108 times regularly is highly beneficial for the natives who are suffering from Kaal Sarpa Yoga. The people who are affected by this yoga can also visit Lord Hanuman’s Mandir and can apply a Tilak of Sindhoor from the idol of Lord Hanuman.

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Chanting Maha Mrityunjaya Mantra 108 times on a Rudraksha Rosary will help the native in getting rid of the Kaal Sarpa Yoga.'Om Tayambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pustivardhanam. Urvarukamiva Bandhanan Mrtyor Muksiya Mamratat’.
Keeping a peacock’s feather in the home will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. Children can also keep it in their books for enhancing their concentration level.

On every Saturday, worshipping Lord Shani and chanting the Moola Mantra of Lord Shani will reduce the effects of Kaal Sarpa Yoga. People can also offer sesame and black gram to Lord Shani.‘Om Shani Charaya Namaha’

Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja is recommended. Place the Kaal Sarpa Yoga Yantra in your home in an auspicious Mahurat to get rid of the Kaal sarpa Yoga. You can also chant this Moola mantra for energizing the yantra. “Bramha Muri Tripurantkari Bhanuh Shashih BhumiSuto Budhashch”
Do pooja on Naag Panchami and after the pooja, make sure that the snake charmer frees the snake in an open ground.

General Shiva Pooja. Even a general Shiva Pooja where one would chant a certain Stotra of Lord Shiva will also reduce the impact of Kaal Sarpaa Dosha. This will please Lord Shiva who can remove all the problems from a natives life. This canting of the mantras in the pooja should be done religiously and with an outbreak.

Do Kaal Sarpa Dosh Nivaran Puja. On every Monday, on the same place and time, offer a handful of wheat, shrivel and a coin of 1, 2, 5, or 10. Chant the name of Lord Rama while offering all these things. Make sure that you take the same value of the coin on every Monday. Perform this cycle of activities for 21 Mondays and get rid of this Yoga.

personal_characteristics.personalised_prediction: Since the  1st lord, Jupiter is in the 4th house, You will have a strict mother who will also be able to discipline you but shall also love you immensely and will fulfill all your demands. You shall be confused about yourself in your early life. You shall be a very late bloomer and the majority of your life will go in focusing on your private life.

Since the  2nd lord, Mars is in the 9th house, You will remain close to your family, especially when it comes to your beliefs and higher education. Strong-willed and headstrong about your values, you will protect your ideas fiercely. Research and law are potential career paths.

Since the  3rd lord, Venus is in the 11th house, You will have a large network of females who will help you to earn wealth. You shall even earn while working in large organizations. You have a very charming way of talking which will attract people towards you.

Since the  4th lord, Mercury is in the 11th house, You will have good gains from your mother. Your communicative skills shall also be great. You may be in business fields related to real estate or construction. You will be a motivating person.

Since the  5th lord, Moon is in the 10th house, You will be interested in the higher studies to help the people who need nourishment and will want to take care of others. You may be a teacher or a professor and you shall get authority.

Since the  6th lord, Sun is in the 10th house, You or father shall be working in the government. You will be related to the field of law and order or in the administration. You are a person of higher learning and wisdom and will be a person of authority.

Since the  7th lord, Mercury is in the 11th house, You shall have a very communicative spouse who shall be business-oriented and will bring in a lot of wealth. He or she shall be calculative about money and will always be saving money.

Since the  8th lord, Venus is in the 11th house, You shall have a high desire for your spouse. You may be a hopeless romantic always trying to find love here and there. Anger, aggression, and dominance will be a part of your relationship.

Since the  9th lord, Mars is in the 9th house, Your a headstrong person and faithful to your religious beliefs. You will assess individuality in the field of higher education or religion. You can even get into physical fights.

Since the  10th lord, Jupiter is in the 4th house, All your energies shall be devoted towards higher studies in the field of philosophy or religion. You are in a good position to become or a professor. You may work in private settings.

Since the  11th lord, Saturn is in the 10th house, You shall have a distant relationship with your father for various reasons. You shall reach an authoritative position in life only after a lot of hard work and effort as nothing shall be easy for you. You may make a career in law or the administrative sector. You shall not be liked by people at work.

Since the  12th lord, Saturn is in the 10th house, You will be in a distant relationship with your father. You will have success in life only after a lot of hard work. You can become a judge but your colleagues will not like you much. Marriage shall be more of a restrictive relation and responsibility.
